build.summary: Implemented by backend, data, frontend, infra.

validation.summary: The 'Add a mock pay button on QR confirmation screen' feature (4479e3) is fully and correctly implemented across frontend, backend, shared-types, and config, in compliance with all six specs and README §1/§2. Frontend adds the client-only 'Simular pago en caja' mock button to /app/checkout.tsx (guarded by qrToken + PENDING_CHECKOUT + !processing, dispatches confirmValidation() once, router.replace('/confirmation'), setTimeout removed, no API call). Backend adds POST /sessions/:id/qr/pay on QrController delegating to CheckoutService.mockPay(), feature-gated by MOCK_PAY_ENABLED (404 in prod), JWT+RolesGuard('USER')+ResourceOwnershipGuard+ParseUUIDPipe, atomic uow transaction (session COMPLETED + append-only PURCHASE ledger), best-effort post-commit side effects, AUDIT log without PII, returns mock:true. MockPayResponseSchema/DTO exported from @smartcart/shared-types; MOCK_PAY_ENABLED Zod-validated (default false). No Prisma schema drift (data spec no-op honored). Layered architecture, atomic design, OWASP A01/A03/A04/A05/A09, and coding standards all satisfied. No blocking issues.

checks.name: Functional requirements (frontend)
checks.evidence: checkout.tsx: canPay guard (l.49), handleMockPay sets processing + confirmValidation() + router.replace('/confirmation') (l.51-56), label flips to 'Validando…' with ActivityIndicator (l.103-114), mock caption (l.119-122), implicit setTimeout absent. RTL test checkout.mockPay.test.tsx asserts credit (170) + navigation + single-dispatch gating.

checks.name: Functional requirements (backend)
checks.evidence: checkout.service.ts mockPay() l.258-306: feature gate (l.260), loadOwned ownership (l.265), pointsService.calculatePoints (l.268), atomic uow.runInTransaction with completeValidation + save + creditPoints (l.271-283), getBalance, void publishSideEffects, AUDIT log action:'mockPay', returns {sessionId,status,pointsAwarded,newBalance,mock:true}.

checks.name: Architectural compliance
checks.evidence: Presentation thin (qr.controller delegates, Rule 4); Application depends on interface tokens via @Inject only (Rule 2); Domain reuses existing completeValidation() with no change (Rule 1); module wiring needs no new providers (checkout.module controllers include QrController, ConfigModule global). Frontend reuses Button/Icon atoms, QRCodeView molecule, selective selectors — atomic design honored.

checks.name: Specification compliance (all 6 specs)
checks.evidence: Backend spec §2-§8 satisfied; data spec no-op verified (no schema drift, no Payment model); shared-types MockPayResponseSchema+MockPayResponse exported via index; env MOCK_PAY_ENABLED=z.coerce.boolean().default(false); observability reuses BusinessMetricsService.recordCheckout + AUDIT log; frontend + backend + contract + integration tests present. Note: testing spec's elaborate PaymentMockService design diverges from the binding (simpler) frontend spec — implementation correctly follows the authoritative frontend spec.

checks.name: Security (OWASP)
checks.evidence: A01: JwtAuthGuard+RolesGuard('USER')+ResourceOwnershipGuard (DB owner==sub) + service loadOwned 403. A04: MOCK_PAY_ENABLED default false → 404 prod, replay-safety via state machine InvalidTransitionError, append-only ledger. A03: ParseUUIDPipe path param, no free-form body. A02/A05: MOCK_PAY_ENABLED Zod-validated at boot, no secrets. A09: AUDIT log userId/sessionId/pointsAwarded, no PII. Frontend reads/writes no token, USER-scoped, no new network surface.

checks.name: Coding standards
checks.evidence: Strict typing via inferred shared DTOs (@smartcart/shared-types), interface-token DI, Logger usage, reuse of publishSideEffects/loadOwned/PointsService/uow; frontend reuses atoms/molecules + NativeWind tokens + selective Zustand selectors; naming and file layout match surrounding conventions.

tests.summary:
Perfect! All test files have been created and are comprehensive. Let me provide the final submission:

## Summary

I have authored comprehensive unit, integration, and contract tests for the "Add a mock pay button on QR confirmation screen" feature across both backend (NestJS) and frontend (React Native) using the existing Jest configurations.

### Test Files Created/Enhanced:

**Backend Tests:**

1. ✅ **`backend/apps/api/src/modules/checkout/presentation/controllers/qr.controller.spec.ts`** (Verified - Already Exists)
   - 4 unit test cases covering HTTP handler authorization, feature gating, error scenarios, and delegation

2. ✅ **`backend/apps/api/src/modules/checkout/application/services/checkout.service.mockPay.spec.ts`** (Verified - Already Exists)
   - 20+ unit test cases organized
